query:
INSERT INTO users (id, email, first_name, last_name, username)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
               RETURNING id         as "id!: Uuid",
                         email,
                         first_name,
                         last_name,
                         username,
                         created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                         updated_at as "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
